subcodes.first_line: In the utmost detachment and sanctity must they render service, never yielding to bribery or self-interest [3.5s]... ...Let them perform their services with complete sanctity and detachment, and on no account defile themselves by receiving bribes, harbouring unseemly motives
subcodes.first_line_orig: در نهایت تنزیه و تقدیس ایفای خدمت کنند و ابدا خود را به رشوه و غرض
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @past, present and future of Iran, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @bribery and corruption, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
